hooks.command: inp=$(cat); ts=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); tool=$(printf '%s' "$inp" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); detail=$(printf '%s' "$inp" | jq -r '(.tool_input.command // .tool_input.file_path // "") | .[0:120]' 2>/dev/null); printf '%s | [%s] %s\n' "$ts" "$tool" "$detail" >> .claude/audit.log 2>/dev/null; exit 0

inp=$(cat); fp=$(printf '%s' "$inp" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$fp" in *.ts|*.tsx) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"TypeScript modified: %s — remember to run pnpm typecheck before committing."}}' "$fp" ;; esac; exit 0

todos=$(grep -rn --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.md' 'TODO\|FIXME\|HACK' . 2>/dev/null | head -50); [ -n "$todos" ] && echo "$todos" | jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Open TODOs/FIXMEs/HACKs to preserve:\n" + .}}' || true; exit 0
